page_content:
ARCH226 History of World Architecture II (3 Credits)

Post-1500 - History of Architecture survey course - History of Architecture structured to develop critical thinking and visually literacy with regard

to the worldwide legacy of design thinking and building innovation in architecture

ARCH270 Design in Practice (3 Credits)

Case studies and hands-on design projects ranging in scale from a product to a building to give students insight into the process by which architects work both individually and collaboratively to put disciplinary knowledge and expertise into practice to shape our built environment.
